notes: Angular SPA with Material Design components. Shadow DOM encapsulation on many components makes selector-based discovery unreliable. Component demos include forms, buttons, menus, dialogs — all rendered dynamically. Sidebar navigation is an Angular Router outlet. Code examples toggle between source and rendered output. Extreme difficulty from Shadow DOM boundaries, dynamic Angular rendering, and nested component hierarchies.

endpoints.label: Demo Form Components
endpoints.description: Interactive form demos: Input, Select, Datepicker, Checkbox, Radio, Slider, Autocomplete — each with live preview

endpoints.label: Component Sidebar
endpoints.description: Left sidebar listing all Material components grouped by category (Form Controls, Navigation, Layout, etc.)

endpoints.label: Code Example Toggle
endpoints.description: Source/Result toggle buttons on component examples showing TypeScript, HTML, CSS tabs

endpoints.label: Search Components
endpoints.description: Search input for filtering component list

endpoints.label: Top Navigation Bar
endpoints.description: Header nav: Components, CDK, Guides with version selector dropdown

endpoints.label: Theme Toggle
endpoints.description: Dark/light theme switcher button in header

endpoints.label: Component Tab Sections
endpoints.description: Tab group within each component page: Overview, API, Examples
